% Conference Paper Template
% Generated by Researcher plugin
% Compile with: scripts/latex-compile.py, which uses tectonic, latexmk, or pdflatex, whichever is installed
%
% NOTE: Replace \documentclass with the conference-specific class:
%   IEEE:  \documentclass[conference]{IEEEtran}
%   ACM:   \documentclass[sigconf]{acmart}
%   LNCS:  \documentclass{llncs}

\documentclass[10pt,twocolumn]{article}

\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage[margin=0.75in]{geometry}

\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{caption}
\usepackage{subcaption}
\usepackage{float}

\usepackage[numbers,compress]{natbib}

\usepackage{hyperref}
\hypersetup{
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=blue,
    citecolor=blue,
    urlcolor=blue
}

% --- Algorithms ---
% \usepackage[ruled,vlined]{algorithm2e}

% --- TikZ ---
% \usepackage{tikz}
% \usepackage{pgfplots}
% \pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}

\title{TITLE}
\author{
    First Author\textsuperscript{1} \quad
    Second Author\textsuperscript{2} \\
    \small\textsuperscript{1}University, Country \quad
    \small\textsuperscript{2}Institution, Country \\
    \small\texttt{\{first, second\}@example.com}
}
\date{}

\begin{document}

\maketitle

\begin{abstract}
% Conference abstracts are typically 150-250 words, single paragraph.
\end{abstract}

% Keywords (if required by conference)
\textbf{Keywords:} keyword1, keyword2, keyword3

\section{Introduction}
% Problem, motivation, contribution (concise, since conferences have page limits)

\section{Related Work}
% Position relative to prior work

\section{Methodology}
% Approach description, architecture, algorithm

\section{Experiments}
% Setup, datasets, baselines, metrics

\section{Results}
% Tables/figures with results, comparison to baselines

\section{Discussion}
% Brief interpretation (often merged with Results at conferences)

\section{Conclusion}
% Summary, contributions, future work

\section*{Acknowledgments}
% Funding, compute resources

\bibliographystyle{plainnat}
\bibliography{references/library}

\end{document}
